panels.panel_visual_description: Character A and Character B sit closely together indoors. Character A is on the left in a black gaming chair. Character B is on the right in a green gaming chair. They look down towards the center, presumably at a phone. The background is a plain, light-colored wall. Lighting is soft and natural. They take turns speaking, sharing smiles and laughs.

scenes.visual_description: A couple sits together with text labels identifying them. A central inset overlay displays a language learning app interface. The app shows various words and pronunciation scores. The couple takes turns speaking into the app, with the man struggling and the woman demonstrating correct pronunciation.
